parameters.query:
INSERT INTO recommender_weeklytopkeyword (week_start, rank_no, keyword, hit_count, created_at)
SELECT
  DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AS week_start,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, MAX(created_at) DESC) AS rank_no,
  keyword,
  COUNT(*)            AS hit_count,
  NOW(6)              AS created_at
FROM recommender_recommendation
WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  AND created_at <  CURDATE()
GROUP BY keyword
ORDER BY hit_count DESC
LIMIT 5
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  keyword   = VALUES(keyword),
  hit_count = VALUES(hit_count);
